details: R4 frozen artifacts were pickled with scikit-learn 1.9.0 but current environment has 1.4.1.post1. LogisticRegression.multi_class attribute removed in 1.9.0 but accessed by 1.4.1 predict_proba.
r4_prediction_error: AttributeError: LogisticRegression object has no attribute multi_class
impact: format_shift_metrics.csv and format_shift_summary.json cannot be generated. Variant inputs are available for manual analysis.
fix_required: Upgrade scikit-learn to >=1.9.0 (requires network access, violates no_network boundary)
